  • Uses of Character in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters

    Subclasses of Character in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Candidate
    A Character subclass which extends PoliticalActor and models a Candidate in the Presidential race.
    class 
    FederalOfficial
     
    class 
    LocalOfficial
     
    class 
    Player
     
    class 
    PoliticalActor
    A Character subclass which represents a Character who may interact with political systems, like leaders, lobbyists, or candidates.
    class 
    StateOfficial

    Constructors in com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters with parameters of type Character
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Character(Character other)
    Deep-copies the existing fields of another Character object.
     
    FederalOfficial(Character character)
     
     
    PoliticalActor(Character character)
    Creates a PoliticalActor by deep-copying the fields of the passed Character object, with all other fields generated by the CharacterManager.
     
    PoliticalActor(Character character, int cash, PoliticalActor.Education education, int[] alignments, List<Experience> experiences, Skills skills, List<Position> positions, Personality personality, Set<PoliticalActor.PoliticalRole> roles)
    Creates a PoliticalActor by deep-copying the fields of the passed Character object, and fills the other fields with the passed values.
     
    StateOfficial(Character character)
